name: Supernova Fundo De Investimento Imobiliario - Recebiveis Imobiliarios
summary: Supernova Fundo de Investimento Imobiliario - Recebiveis Imobiliarios is a real estate investment fund that invests in real estate receivables. The fund's objective is to provide investors with income and capital appreciation through investments in a diversified portfolio of real estate receivables. The fund is managed by Nova Brasil Gestao de Recursos Ltda and headquartered in Brazil.
